title: Cobblemon - MC Swords for Honedge Line
description: Adds alternative textures for Honedge / Doublade / Aegislash based on Minecraft sword textures
body:
![Clumpy Bros](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18687dd80feef348a9375afdcfb28892c8b76e73.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gKvBnr3RDI4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is a simple mod that allows the player to change Honedge and its evolutions' appearances to make them look like Minecraft swords.

With the introduction of cosmetic items in Cobblemon 1.7, you can now simply give Honedge / Doublade / Aegislash the corresponding item and instantly get the new texture! No stupid self-evolution nonsense! All of the textures have also been updated to fit with the new revamped models, and two new variants have been added: Ruby and Burger (Burger only works if you have the BurgersRCool mod installed; you can use this pack without it, you just won't see the Burger variant).



The resources for each are:

- Stick -> Wood
- Cobblestone -> Stone
- Iron Ingot -> Iron
- Gold Ingot -> Gold
- Diamond -> Diamond
- Netherite Ingot -> Netherite
- Copper Ingot -> Copper
- Emerald -> Emerald
- Red Dye -> Ruby
- Clongusburg Ingot -> Burger _(BurgersRCool Only)_

INSTALLATION:
Newer versions of this pack are packaged as mods, so just hit install and you should be good.

For older versions packaged as a datapack, place the file in both the resource pack folder AND data pack folder of your world.

Feel free to include this in your modpacks and such, no credit needed. Have fun!
